item.title: PSA from a professional purchaser
item.description: I do purchasing for a company that builds McMansions. We do higher end custom new construction for people with more money than sense... Part of my job is monitoring and updating prices from our various suppliers and manufacturers, so that we can bid our jobs accurately. In normal years this means an inflation bump once a year, or in worse years twice a year. This year I've already had to bump prices up 3 times due to the tariffs, and we've been told to expect another price increase at the end of this month. The interesting thing is... The companies with the largest increases have been companies that advertise themselves as "Made in America" As someone who buys things for a living, I know why, and as a consumer, and hopefully a voter, you should probably know this too. So let me explain... Tariffs incentivize people to buy domestic products, by raising the price of imports. This in turn creates more demand for domestic products. With higher demand comes higher prices. Economics 101, right? But why would prices on domestic products be going up faster and higher than imported products? Well... Here's the thing. Practically nothing you buy is entirely domestic. Some raw material, component, or processing comes from somewhere else. So, your made in the USA products are seeing higher demand, but are also subjected to tariffs at some point in their supply chain. And while we're here... Remember that prices tend to be "sticky" even if/when these tariffs are delayed or ended those prices will be very slow to come back down, if they ever do.
item.dc:creator: skapanda616

item.title: A body riddled with parasites as a result of eating raw pork over the years. The condition was discovered by accident after the patient came in for an X-ray for a hip fracture.In this case, the tapeworm larvae migrated to muscles and soft tissue
item.description: A body riddled with parasites as a result of eating raw pork over the years. The condition was discovered by accident after the patient came in for an X-ray for a hip fracture. In this case, the tapeworm larvae migrated to muscles and soft tissue in the hips and legs, forming cysts that calcified, creating a "rice grain" pattern on the X-ray. While cysts in soft tissue are usually harmless, if they reach the brain, they can cause neurocysticercosis, leading to life-threatening symptoms like seizures and headaches.

item.title: It took me hours to read and answer to all the most amazing and supportive comments you wrote to me! I'm crying of joy! I'm enormous grateful to have such people in my life. Thank you a ton for being with me!
item.description: In fact, I have been a full-time artist for several years now. I don't know how, but somehow I will manage to do it without galleries. Thanks to you all and constant, tireless daily work. But I still want to develop and, as everyone says, get into prestigious galleries and exhibitions. I'm not very good at this. But I will continue to find my way anyway. I do it because I can't not to do it. So wait for my updates and new paintings. I wish everyone a nice weekend! Tanbelia ☘️
item.dc:creator: tanbeliaart

item.title: Chatty kitties part 18 ᓚᘏᗢ
item.description:
Welcome to part 18 of 4629. Please check that you have your Wi-Fi switched on, and your seat in the upright position.
Smol creature wonders why he should go there when you could just as easily come here.
I would like to give a special thank you to @tampacl as I seem to steal / borrow / re-distribute a lot of their clips. Thank you!
House panther shares his opinion, courtesy of @digitalgamba.
Wiggles demands belly rubs yet again, courtesy of @AGoodSmell.
Behold! The fabled Shitten!
Some hotels only leave mints on your pillow.
Sensory garden tax. ~ Part 1 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-2H36dD7 Part 2 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-2-At4BDLA Part 3 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-3-1kWpow7 Part 4 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-4-CelEHoq Part 5 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-5-ZaTUgym Part 6 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-6-iTGAyBs Part 7 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-7-OtLSfZK Part 8 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-8-B9QnwnD Part 9 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-9-5ctDpZm Part 10 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-10-tT7WhM8 Part 11 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-11-popEHkF Part 12 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-12-yDJWYyi Part 13 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-13-QLJTm7q Part 14 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-14-V6X1qZo Part 15 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-15-abPq07r Part 16 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-16-xjJvTya Part 17 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-17-qvRi49c
item.dc:creator: timmargh

item.title: Bow building student makes her first bow
item.description: After a four day class she made this beautiful Osage longbow. Using only hand tools like draw knives, rasps and scrapers she started with a rough split stave of seasoned Osage and ended with a fully finished bow. It has a backing of sturgeon skin, horn tip overlays and a leather handle wrap. Before all the archery experts jump in to pick apart her form, she is new to archery and our goal here was to simply shoot some arrows through the bow to make sure it felt good and looked good before we finished it up. https://swiftwoodbows.com/workshops
item.dc:creator: TaxusBrevifolia

item.title: SATURDAY DUMP Of Soul Soup (Watch This If You're Feeling Down) #397
item.description:
1. Bro is high on happiness and enjoying it!
2. The singing wonder from Scotland: Nati Dreddd (sound on, obviously)
3. This mom's face when Mr. Rogers shares some perspective on her about her daughter trying to cut her own hair
4. Do you ever see a video like this and just think "This is a person who should be in office and making decisions to help the people, not whatever corrupt insider trading a-holes we have now"?
5. Sparing partners
6. Dogs vs the NEWS
7. Fabulous cat
8. Couch Zoomies
9. Cute pet is cute
10. Lazy boy has found a way to catch the ball without the running part
11. Perfect Saturday morning
12. What an amazing discovery!
13
14. Students and staff at an Oklahoma elementary school lined the hallways to cheer for their school cafeteria manager who passed her test to become a U.S. citizen.
15. Good people of the internet! Thank you if you made it all the way trough :) Today I just wanted to share that a two year journey of mine is about to come to an end. I've been working on a wacky game that is finally getting some attention (covered by IGN and VICE in the past 2 months) and we have just 4 DAYS TO GO until release. Right now all kinds of feelings and emotions are running trough my mind and I'm not sure how exactly to handle it. We will see what happens : ) Anyway if you want to help us with the final push, a simple wishlist of the game on Steam would be wonderful! https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames
